description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire

You manifest a miniature sun — a sphere of pure, annihilating fire. Choose a point within 100 feet. All creatures in a 30-foot burst take 10d10 fire damage (basic Reflex DC 10 + your level + highest mental modifier).

The area becomes an inferno for 1 minute: difficult terrain, and any creature that enters the area or starts its turn within it takes 3d8 fire damage (basic Reflex, same DC).

You can use Dai Enkai: Entei once per day.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Dai Enkai: Entei is one of the most powerful area attacks in the game. The once-per-day limit is intentional. The persistent inferno area can reshape battlefield positioning significantly.
